title: HOZO NeoRuler Digital Ruler, 12 inch Smart Ruler with Infinite Customized Scales and ±0.004 inch Accuracy, 93 Built-in US Imperial and Metric Scales
features: 93 BUILT-IN SCALES: NeoRuler provides 93 built-in scales for maximum versatility. Multiple units; decimal feet, feet-inches, decimal inches, yards, millimeters, meters, kilometers

CUSTOMIZE INFINITE SCALES: NeoRuler allows you to define unlimited scales when missing or out-of-plan scales. Perfect match for work of architect, interior designer, civil engineers, real estate, and any DIY projects.
SPACE DIVIDER: Equally divide space quickly to any length without any calculation, and divides a certain distance into 2-12 sections with LED light indicator on NeoRuler.

FREE APP via BLUTOOH: Transfer measured data to MEAZOR APP and continue further editing & drawing to track data. Export to CAD files dxf. pdf. jpg. to share at ease. Create and save unlimited scale lists on MEAZOR APP and upload them on NeoRuler anytime.
MODULAR DESIGN:5 sets of modules to assist with reading, drafting, collecting, and even transforming into a scale caliper(Need to Purchase Additional Accessories）
DURABILITY & PERFECT DESIGN: The frame with durable high-pressure aluminum alloy and Stainless Steel.12-inch-long, 184g, 1000mah battery. The best design for daily use and carrying.
